name: Robin SuperSpikie

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E9594C30-AB04-4A3C-9225-F0780893806B

comment: Bigger, brighter and bolder, the SuperSpikie takes the look to another level.  Four times brighter than the original Spikie and with the addition of rotating gobos – this effects machine has even more looks to blast through its 165mm front lens.

capabilities.comment: Quiet mode- fan noise control from min to max
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour Mix)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: Bigger, brighter and bolder, the SuperSpikie takes the look to another level.  Four times brighter than the original Spikie and with the addition of rotating gobos – this effects machine has even more looks to blast through its 165mm front lens.

revision.text: 2025-06-11  Pan tilt continuous physical data revision
